name: Basic Red Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or yellow bell pepper, seeded, stemmed, and roughly chopped
2 Pickling (Kirby) cucumbers, peeled and roughly chopped
4 Slices good stale white bread, crusts removed
1 large or 2 small cloves garlic, peeled
1/4 cup Sherry or good wine vinegar, or to taste
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
Garlic croutons, if desired, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince a bit of the tomato, pepper, and cucumber for garnish and set aside.
2. Soak bread in 1 cup of cold water for 5 minutes, then squeeze out excess water.
3. Place soaked bread in a blender or food processor with remaining tomato, pepper, cucumber, garlic, vinegar; process until smooth.
4. Slowly add olive oil while the machine is running.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Before serving, check seasoning again and garnish with reserved tomato, pepper, cucumber, and garlic croutons.
